assertions.assertion: Uses AddAspNetIdentityMigration() with a connection string pointing to the existing ASP.NET Identity database
States that existing password hashes are preserved (users can log in with current passwords)
assertions.rationale: Explicitly states 'Password hashes are preserved — users can continue to log in with their existing passwords'.

assertions.assertion: Mentions that migration is idempotent (subsequent runs skip already-imported users)
assertions.rationale: States 'Migration is idempotent — subsequent runs skip users that have already been imported'.

assertions.assertion: Mentions that after migration users can enroll in passwordless methods
assertions.rationale: States 'After migration, users can enroll in passwordless methods — once migrated, users can set up OTP, TOTP, or passkeys'.
